zh.lifeSummary: 當Y van Gent於大約1080年出生在比利時利包格阿爾斯特時，她的父親Boudewijn de Gent29歲，母親Oda de Avegnes55歲。她於大約1110年與Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫代音比特格-艾阿-德勒結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1125年享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Y van Gent于大约1080年出生在比利时利包格阿爾斯特时，她的父亲Boudewijn de Gent29岁，母亲Oda de Avegnes55岁。她于大约1110年与Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫代音比特格-艾阿-德勒结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1125年享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and French: nickname from Old French gent, Middle English gent(e) ‘high born, noble’, hence ‘noble of character or conduct, courteous’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Ghent .
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with gand ‘spell’, such as Gandolf.

variants.name: Ghent
meanings: English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Gent .

variants.name: Gentes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Henri, Lucien, Marcel, Normand.
French (Gentès): probably a nickname derived from Old French gent ‘high born, noble’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Gent  .

variants.name: Genther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Otto.

variants.name: Genthe
meanings: German: variant of Gente (see Gent ), or a habitational name from Gentha in Saxony-Anhalt, east of Wittenberg.

en.lifeSummary: When Y van Gent was born about 1080, in Aalst, Limburg, Belgium, her father, Boudewijn de Gent, was 29 and her mother, Oda de Avegnes, was 55. She married Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM about 1110, in Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, East Flanders, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1125, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Y van Gent est née environ 1080, à Aalst, Limbourg, Belgique, son père, Boudewijn de Gent, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Oda de Avegnes, avait 55 ans. Elle a épousé Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM environ 1110, à Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1125, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Y van Gent um 1080 in Aalst, Limburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Boudewijn de Gent 29 und ihre Mutter Oda de Avegnes 55. Sie hat um 1110 in Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, Ostflandern, Belgien Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1125 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Y van Gent è nata il circa 1080 nel Aalst, Limburgo, Belgio, sua padre, Boudewijn de Gent, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Oda de Avegnes, aveva 55 anni. Lei sposato Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM circa 1110, nel Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1125, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Y van Gentが約1080年にベルギーリンブルグアールストで生まれた時，父Boudewijn de Gentは29歳，母Oda de Avegnesは55歳であった。約1110年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンデインズペテジェム-アーン-デ-レイでEngelbert IV VAN PETEGHEMと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1125年に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Y van Gent(이)가 대략 1080년 벨기에 림버그 알스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Boudewijn de Gent(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Oda de Avegnes(은)는 55세였다. 그녀는 대략 1110년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 데인즈 피테그-아아-데-레이에서 Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1125년 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1080–about 1125: tany ho any amin'ny 1080–tany ho any amin'ny 1125

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Y van Gent nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Aalst, Limburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Boudewijn de Gent, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Oda de Avegnes, tinha 55 anos. Ela casou-se com Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM aproximadamente 1110, em Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1125, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Y van Gent родилась около 1080 г. в местности аалст, лимбург, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Boudewijn de Gent было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Oda de Avegnes, 55. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM около 1110 г. в местности питегем-аан-де-ли, динз, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1125 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

sm.about 1080–about 1125: e tusa o le 1080–e tusa o le 1125

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Y van Gent nació aproximadamente 1080, en Aalst, Limburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Boudewijn de Gent, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Oda de Avegnes, tenía 55 años. Se casó con Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM aproximadamente 1110, en Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1125, a la edad de 47 años.
